info.title: MMS API Documentation
info.description: API documentation for Mosque Management System (MMS)

post.description: Create a new parent account. An OTP verification email will be sent.

200.description: Account created successfully. OTP sent to email.

message.example: Account created. OTP sent to your email.

post.description: Verify the OTP code sent to the registered email address
Authenticate and receive an access token
Request password reset. If email exists, an OTP will be sent (for security, always returns success).

message.example: If email exists, OTP has been sent.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the halaqa to update

post.summary: Add students to halaqa: Required Role: **halaqa_supervisor**

delete.summary: Remove student from halaqa: Required Role: **halaqa_supervisor**

post.description: Send invitation email. Prevents duplicate active invitations for same email.
Accept invitation using token. Creates new account or attaches role to existing user.

name.description: Required only if creating new account

password.description: Required only if creating new account

password_confirmation.description: Required only if creating new account

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all mosques.

post.description: Creates a new mosque record. Requires authentication.

manager_id.description: User ID of a mosque_manager role user.

get.summary: Search mosques by  name, city, or district
get.description: Search mosques by name, city, or district.
Returns a list of mosques marked as featured.
Returns all mosques located in the specified city.

404.description: No mosques found for this city

get.description: Returns the details of a specific mosque by its ID.

put.description: Updates an existing mosque record. Requires authentication.

manager_id.description: User ID of a mosque_manager role user.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a mosque record. Requires authentication.

patch.description: Updates only the status of a mosque (active/inactive). Requires authentication.
Toggles the featured state of a mosque. Requires authentication.
Updates the rating of a mosque. Requires authentication.

get.description: Returns a list of all available facilities. Public endpoint.

post.summary: Create a new facility / {Region Manager Only}
post.description: Creates a new standalone facility. Requires authentication.

put.description: Updates an existing facility. Requires authentication.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a facility. Requires authentication.

get.summary: List facilities for a mosque /{public endpoint}
get.description: Returns all facilities associated with a specific mosque. Public endpoint.

post.summary: Attach facilities to a mosque (add facilities to exists facilities) / {Mosque Manager Only}
post.description: Adds one or more facilities to a mosque without removing existing ones. Requires authentication.

post.summary: Detach facilities from a mosque (delete this facilities from mosque) / {Mosque Manager Only}
post.description: Removes one or more facilities from a mosque. Requires authentication.

post.summary: Sync facilities for a mosque (delete exists facilities and add array of facilities )/ {Mosque Manager Only}
post.description: Replaces all existing facility associations with the provided list. Requires authentication.

message.example: Access denied. Your role does not allow this action.
